spec_coverage.notes: All 7 spec endpoints covered: GET /, GET /api/tasks (+ 404), GET /api/memory/{id} (merged, partial, 404), GET /api/logs (entries + empty), GET /api/events (route registered + generator tests), GET /api/tasks/{id}/approval, POST /api/approve/{id} (sets flag, deletes sentinel, 404).

constraint_compliance.notes: All spec constraints met: SSE endpoint implemented as infinite polling generator; no auth; no database; reads from cwd; single dashboard.html served statically; no npm/build; StreamingResponse with text/event-stream.

test_validity.notes: All 18 tests correctly assert their stated intent. Fixtures isolate test state. SSE generator tests call __anext__() sequentially. Round-trip approval test is valid. No wrong expected values found.

impl_correctness.notes: Traced all endpoints: _read_json returns None for missing files; get_memory 404s only when all three files absent; get_logs returns [] when log is missing; SSE generator emits immediately on mtime change; approve reads/writes JSON in-place and deletes sentinel if it exists; get_approval defaults to false when file is missing.
